name: mshot
description: Simple, stable full-page screenshot CLI tool

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format
scripts.test: node test/lib/options.test.js && node test/lib/route-patterns.test.js && node test/lib/url-list.test.js && node test/lib/segments.test.js && node test/smoke/quick.mjs
scripts.test:unit: node test/lib/options.test.js && node test/lib/route-patterns.test.js && node test/lib/url-list.test.js && node test/lib/segments.test.js
scripts.test:full: node test/lib/options.test.js && node test/lib/route-patterns.test.js && node test/lib/url-list.test.js && node test/lib/segments.test.js && node test/smoke/full.mjs
scripts.verify:full: npm run check && npm run test:full
scripts.verify:release: npm run check && npm run test:full && npm run test:package
